experiments.name: Backbone capacity scaling on realistic dataset with ViT
experiments.notes: Auto-generated manifest for autonomous run. Spec description: Phase17 showed strong results on tinyimagenet with ResNet18 (0.0221 forgetting). Testing ViT explores whether modern architectures with different inductive biases (self-attention vs. convolution) improve continual adaptation on realistic streams. This directly tests architectural robustness at production scale without requiring larger datasets.

purpose: Autonomously generated manifest for experiment 'scale_backbone_capacity_vit_tinyimagenet' (Backbone capacity scaling on realistic dataset with ViT). Project: scale_backbone_capacity_vit_tinyimagenet-tinyimagenet-v1. Dataset: split_tinyimagenet, method: tcl, seeds: [42, 0, 1].
